highcontrast-tag-background-color-emphas.description: Defined in `.spectrum-Tag.is-emphasized`. Used by `.spectrum-Tag.is-emphasized.is-focused, .spectrum-Tag.is-emphasized:focus-visible`. Defaults to `var(--mod-tag-background-color-emphasized-focus, var(--spectrum-tag-background-color-emphasized-focus))`, if not set.

highcontrast-tag-border-color-disabled.description: Defined in `.spectrum-Tag.is-disabled`. Used by `.spectrum-Tag.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--mod-tag-border-color-disabled, var(--spectrum-tag-border-color-disabled))`, if not set.

highcontrast-tag-background-color-disabl.description: Defined in `.spectrum-Tag.is-disabled`. Used by `.spectrum-Tag.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--mod-tag-background-color-disabled, var(--spectrum-tag-background-color-disabled))`, if not set.

highcontrast-tag-content-color-disabled.description: Defined in `.spectrum-Tag.is-disabled`. Used by `.spectrum-Tag.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--mod-tag-content-color-disabled, var(--spectrum-tag-content-color-disabled))`, if not set.
